Skill Path: Identity

You are a master of disguise, easily able to Impersonate whomever you want..

While developing your skills in Deception you chose to focus specifically on Identity, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.7F3sTNRoNsQgD8tX]{Backup Disguise}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.z1Z22gTp7J1VRLSR]{Different Worlds}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate}.
